resultList.dtldesc: This expansive 3 BHK apartment in Sector 33, Sohna, Gurgaon, presents an exceptional residential opportunity within one of the region’s most ambitious integrated townships. Situated in the prestigious "Central Park Flower Valley" development, this residence offers a sophisticated living environment that blends luxury with a focus on wellness, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a high-quality home in a picturesque and well-connected suburban setting.::::Property Specifications::The residence features a sprawling super area of 1,640 sq. ft, providing a well-ventilated and light-filled layout designed for modern family living. Positioned within a high-rise tower, the apartment is designed to capture panoramic views of the Aravalli foothills and the lushly landscaped township. Offered in a semi-furnished state, the property includes high-quality flooring and contemporary fittings that maintain a professional and sleek aesthetic throughout. The layout comprises three spacious bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, complemented by multiple balconies that ensure excellent natural light and cross-ventilation. The construction reflects premium architectural standards, offering a refined and durable living space.::::Facilities::The property is situated within a premier gated community that provides a comprehensive suite of world-class facilities. Residents benefit from a consistent 24-hour water supply, 100% power backup, and a professional multi-tier security system with CCTV surveillance. The development is renowned for its extensive lifestyle amenities, including a state-of-the-art clubhouse, multiple swimming pools, a well-equipped gymnasium, and dedicated sports academies. The township features expansive green areas, manicured gardens, and themed parks, creating a serene environment for recreation. Additionally, the project includes essential on-site services such as retail outlets, a laundry service, and ample parking space for residents and visitors alike.::::Locality::Situated strategically in Sector 33, Sohna, the property enjoys excellent connectivity via the elevated Sohna Road and the upcoming Delhi-Mumbai Expressway. The neighbourhood is a premier residential hub, offering easy access to reputable educational institutions such as GD Goenka World School and K.R. Mangalam University. For healthcare, top-tier facilities including the Vardaan Hospital and Trauma Centre are located within a short distance. The locality is well-served by public transport and provides a streamlined commute to the primary commercial districts of Gurgaon, including Golf Course Extension Road and Cyber City. Its unique position at the foothills of the Aravallis, combined with world-class infrastructure, makes this a highly practical and desirable location for a modern and peaceful lifestyle.

resultList.dtldesc: This elegant 2 BHK apartment in Noida Extension, Greater Noida, offers a refined living experience within the popular Ska Green Mansion development. Spanning a super built-up area of 1095 sq. ft, this property is situated on the 6th floor of a 17-storey building. The apartment features an East-facing entrance, which ensures plenty of natural sunlight and a bright, welcoming atmosphere throughout the day. Designed for modern living, this ready-to-move-in home is part of a secure gated community that provides a balanced lifestyle for families and working professionals in the heart of the National Capital Region.Property SpecificationsThe apartment is semi-furnished and thoughtfully planned to include two well-proportioned bedrooms and two modern bathrooms. A standout feature of this property is the inclusion of three private balconies, which offer pleasant views of the internal garden, the swimming pool, and the main road, while also providing excellent cross-ventilation. Additionally, the layout includes a dedicated puja room, catering to the cultural and spiritual needs of the residents. The apartment is held under freehold ownership, ensuring a secure and hassle-free transaction for the buyer. The interiors are maintained in professional condition, reflecting the quality associated with the SKA Group.FacilitiesSka Green Mansion is equipped with a comprehensive suite of amenities designed to enhance the quality of life for its residents. The society features a modern clubhouse, a well-equipped gymnasium, and a swimming pool for recreation and fitness. Essential services include high-speed lifts, 24-hour security with an intercom facility, and RO water systems. Residents also benefit from modern connectivity options such as internetWi-Fi and DTH television facilities. For social gatherings, a banquet hall is available within the premises, while sports enthusiasts can make use of the outdoor tennis courts. The community is designed with ample green spaces, ensuring a tranquil environment amidst the urban landscape.LocalityLocated in Noida Extension, also known as Greater Noida West, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major commercial hubs in Noida and Delhi. The locality is well-served by a network of wide roads and is in close proximity to the Noida-Greater Noida Link Road. The area is home to numerous reputed educational institutions, healthcare centres, and shopping malls, making it a highly self-sufficient neighbourhood. Public transport is easily accessible, and the upcoming metro expansion in the region is set to further enhance its connectivity. The presence of well-established residential projects and commercial spaces nearby makes this an ideal choice for those seeking a modern home in a thriving urban locality.

resultList.dtldesc: This elegant three-bedroom apartment in Dwarka Sector 11 offers a spacious and sophisticated living experience in one of New Delhi's most well-planned residential sub-cities. Situated within a secure and established cooperative group housing society, the property is designed to provide a perfect blend of modern comfort and community living. Its strategic location and thoughtful design make it an ideal choice for families seeking a premium home with excellent connectivity and a serene environment.::::Property Specifications::The apartment boasts a generous super area of 1,850 sq. ft, ensuring ample space for all family members. The floor plan is meticulously designed to include three large bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, providing a high level of privacy and convenience. This semi-furnished residence features a contemporary modular kitchen and high-quality woodwork, including built-in wardrobes that maximise storage. The interiors are finished with a combination of premium marble and vitrified tile flooring, complemented by multiple balconies that offer pleasant views of the manicured society gardens and ensure the home is well-ventilated.::::Facilities::The society is equipped with a comprehensive range of facilities designed to ensure a comfortable and secure lifestyle. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply and a robust power backup system for both the apartment and common areas. Security is a primary focus, with professional guards, intercom facilities, and 24/7 CCTV surveillance protecting the premises. The building is serviced by high-speed lifts and provides dedicated covered parking for residents. Additionally, the community offers recreational amenities such as a clubhouse, a children's play area, and beautifully landscaped walking tracks.::::Locality::Sector 11 is one of the most desirable pockets of Dwarka, known for its wide roads and lush green surroundings. The property is exceptionally well-located, with the Dwarka Sector 11 Metro Station within walking distance, providing seamless connectivity to the rest of Delhi and Gurgaon. The neighbourhood is home to several top-tier schools, multi-speciality hospitals, and vibrant local markets that cater to all daily needs. Its proximity to the Indira Gandhi International Airport and the upcoming International Convention Centre adds significant value, making it a prime residential destination for professionals and families alike.

The strategic location and proximity to key road networks make Sector 128 one of the most sought after residential destinations in Noida, offering an exceptional blend of luxury, connectivity, and peaceful living.
